assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 extracts the Upstream Affected Component (axios) from customfield_10632 and uses it to search for related CVE Jiras (§1.59)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md section 1 states 'Field: customfield_10632 / Value: axios'. Section 2 shows a JQL query using this field: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND cf[10632] ~ "axios" AND key != TC-8010', returning TC-8008 as a match.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 filters search results by matching PS Component (customfield_10669 = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832 = rhtpa-2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md section 3 explicitly filters TC-8008 by both fields: 'PS Component: pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui (matches)' and 'Stream: rhtpa-2.2 (matches)', concluding 'TC-8008 passes the filter.'

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 traverses issuelinks on TC-8008 to find remediation task TC-8009 via the 'Depend' link type
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md section 4 'Traverse Issue Links on TC-8008' states: 'Depend: TC-8009 (remediation Task)' with summary 'Bump axios to 1.9.0 in rhtpa-ui [rhtpa-2.2]' and status 'In Progress'. Concludes 'Remediation task found: TC-8009'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 compares the remediation task's bump version (1.9.0) against the current CVE's fix threshold (1.8.2) and determines the fix is already covered
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md section 5 'Compare Remediation Coverage' shows: 'Bump target version (from TC-8009): 1.9.0', 'Current CVE's fix threshold (CVE-2026-44492): >= 1.8.2', 'Comparison: 1.9.0 >= 1.8.2', 'Result: COVERED'.

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing the issue because existing remediation task TC-8009 already bumps axios past the fix threshold — no new remediation task is created
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md states 'Decision: Close -- covered by existing remediation (cross-CVE overlap)' and in the triage path table: 'Step 8 -- Remediation: No new tasks created. Existing TC-8009 covers this CVE.' The recommendation also says 'Close TC-8010 with appropriate resolution -- the fix is already covered by TC-8009'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 creates a Related link between the current CVE (TC-8010) and the related CVE (TC-8008) with an idempotency check on existing issuelinks before creating
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md section 6 documents: 'Related link: TC-8010 <-> TC-8008 (same upstream component -- axios)' with idempotency check: 'Check existing issuelinks on TC-8010: no existing links found' followed by 'Action: Create Related link between TC-8010 and TC-8008'. triage-outcome.md action 1 confirms: 'Create Related link: TC-8010 <-> TC-8008 (same upstream component: axios)'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 creates a Depend link from the covering remediation task (TC-8009) to the current CVE (TC-8010) with an idempotency check on existing issuelinks before creating
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md section 6 documents: 'Depend link: TC-8010 -> TC-8009 (covering remediation task)' with idempotency check: 'Check existing issuelinks on TC-8010: no existing links found' followed by 'Action: Create Depend link from TC-8010 to TC-8009'. triage-outcome.md action 2 confirms: 'Create Depend link: TC-8010 -> TC-8009 (covering remediation task)'.

assertion_results.text: A comment is posted on the current CVE documenting the cross-CVE overlap finding — including the related CVE key (TC-8008), covering task key (TC-8009), library (axios), bump version (1.9.0), and fix threshold (1.8.2)
assertion_results.evidence: Both overlap-check.md and triage-outcome.md contain comment text to be posted on TC-8010. The triage-outcome.md post-triage summary comment includes all required elements: 'existing remediation task TC-8009 (from CVE-2026-42035 / TC-8008) bumps axios to 1.9.0, which meets and exceeds this CVE's fix threshold (>= 1.8.2)'. All five required items are present: TC-8008, TC-8009, axios, 1.9.0, 1.8.2.
